name: Dottie's Mexican Wedding Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preparation time: 15 minutes Baking time: 10 to 12 minutes per batch
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Cream together butter and confectioners' sugar in a mixer bowl until smooth.
2. Gradually add flour, salt, and vanilla, mixing until well blended. Stir in chopped pecans.
3. Form teaspoon-sized pieces of dough into balls and place them on an ungreased cookie sheet.
4. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, or until lightly golden. Remove from the oven when the bottoms are golden brown.
5. Immediately roll each cookie in confectioners' sugar before serving.
